reviews.review_title: How do you mess up physics this bad?
reviews.review_description: I actually attempted to gain skill but it literally feels like im on an uncontrollable pogo stick that goes fowards and back. It feels like flappy bird but wingless. Also there is no saving yourself from falls and ladders have bad grabbing physics.

Fun but the hands are so bouncy that if you softly touch the ground you fly so if you can find a way to use the bounce to your advantage go ahead but I'm not willing to so yeah it just makes the game harder

How do you manage to make a parkour game, with gorilla tag movement SO BAD. Your hand glitch through the ground, you sometimes just slide for some reason and you have almost no control over your character. It’s not worth buying it, even tho it’s free, would refund if I could. 

(It also probably took 10 minutes to make this game)

So the video makes it look so good so i download the game and the movement just sucks. Devs if your reading this please fix this. I got back to playing this game my hands got stuck in everything that one tower that you have to shoot left and right with the webs is impossible. 1 star.

Cool concept, the trailer makes it look smooth and intuitive, but for some reason I just can't move properly in the game, and really even have a hard time moving forward. 
It's not just a lack of skill, it just doesn't really work well. I could try to get better at the quirks but unfortunately the game gives me motion sickness, maybe it's the frame-rate I'm not sure. I didn't have this problem when I played most other physics games.

developer_response.body:
Hey Wyndana, thanks for your feedback!

We can imagine how frustrating the situation must be! We'll figure out what's causing the problem and fix it as soon as possible!

Update: Difficulties with movement have been improved with version 0.66!

reviews.review_description: Very unresponsive and doesn’t work at all.  Great idea but I have more control over the weather than the character on screen
This game is cool and fun but you have to pay for the full game it would be way better if the full game was free

developer_response.body:
Hi William, thanks for your review!

We're glad you like our game and want to have access to all the content, but the main reason why we charge for some content is so that we can continue to develop the game and add more content. 

Besides that, our pricing policy has always been “for the price of a coffee”. Still, we understand your criticism and would love to gift you a key if you contact us on Discord!
